snippet.title: DAMAS GRATIS - PERRITO MALVADO  Ft. L-GANTE & MARITA
snippet.description:
Esc√ļchalo en todas las plataformas: https://orcd.co/perritomalvado
Segu√≠ la Playlist Oficial en Spotify: http://bit.ly/DamasGratis-ATR
A mediados de enero, en un viaje de vacaciones estaban Marita, Tomito y Pablito componiendo Perrito Malvado, el cual no estaba terminado porque algo le faltaba,‚ÄĮentr√≥ al ruedo L-Gante‚ÄĮaportando su arte y‚ÄĮ como fruto de esta fusi√≥n se cre√≥ esta s√ļper canci√≥n. 

Voces: Marita / L-Gante / Pablo Lescano 
T√©cnico de Grabaci√≥n: Tomi Lescano 
T√©cnico de Edici√≥n: Ema Records‚ÄĮ 
Ingeniero Mezcla y Mastering: Alfredo Yasinski 
Arte de tapa: David Zelonka 
Video: Orco Videos 
Cr√≠ticas‚ÄĮconstructivas de Pablo Morales y Cecilia 
Asistencia General: El Gera 
Agradecimientos: 
Locaciones de L√°zaro‚ÄĮFlores / Peto / Gomer√≠a la Barrera de la Familia de Pipi Canal de Carupa. 
A toda la gente de nuestro pueblo San Fernando / Tigre, zona norte  y alrededores que colaboraron y participaron para hacer posible este video. 

PD:  Por supuesto al p√ļblico‚ÄĮfiel que siempre est√° ah√≠‚ÄĮhaciendo el aguante, de ustedes depende la continuidad de la‚ÄĮm√ļsica nacional popular de nuestra Patria.  Gracias. 

Perrito Malvado 
El perrito se fue de casa 
en pleno brillar de la luna 
por que hab√≠a una perra alzada 
que quer√≠a que pinte alguna 
APD 
perrito malvado 
agarras caravana
volves re mamado 
El perrito se fue de casa
en pleno brillar de la luna 
por que hab√≠a una perra alzada 
que quer√≠a que pinte alguna
Lo vieron darse la fuga por las v√≠as
se notaba que arrancaba ya la gira
las calles del barrio ya lo conoc√≠an 
se sabia que ma√Īana no volv√≠a
Mi perrito malvado
ay no seas as√≠
Te suelto la correa 
y te me queres ir 
Y si me sueltan la correa 
yo arranco pa la perrera 
donde est√°n todas las perras 
que mas mueven su cadera
este ritmo suavecito para que baile despacito 
yo me tiro este pasito
mientras enrolo ese fasito
Meta cumbia pisando barro
todas las negra moviendo el tarro
puro traqueteo pistolero
vos sabes que soy cumbiero

    haza√Īas que promet√≠
Solo seguir cantando‚Ä¶

La traici√≥n duele hacia atr√°s
(no sabes cuando comienza)
Un √°ngel sonso amateur
    me conden√≥ al Para√≠so
    Solo me falta saber
      la fecha y el lugar
      y all√≠ ir√© cantando‚Ä¶

Mis amores refugi√© 
en el arc√≥n del amor propio
(al soberbio todo le es
    sufrido y muy aburrido)

Yo ya no puedo cumplir
    haza√Īas que promet√≠
    Solo marchar cantando

M√°s de una vez me escuch√© decir
    que en la resistencia est√°
todo el hidalgo valor de la vida

Yo ya no puedo cumplir
haza√Īas que promet√≠
Solo esperar cantando‚Ä¶

snippet.title: C. Tangana: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit ‚ÄĒ stripped-down sets, an intimate setting ‚ÄĒ just a different space.

Anamaria Sayre | April 20, 2021
C. Tangana's extended family basking in the warmth of sobremesa with easy smiles and effortless baile looks otherworldly after more than 13 months amid a global pandemic. But considering the Spanish rapper's past year back home in Madrid, the simplicity feels fiercely authentic. (Check his mama and t√≠a vibing in the corner.)

This first live performance of his latest album, El Madrile√Īo (including a global premiere of a fresh single, "Me Maten") buzzes with communal energy, spotlighting talent from across Latin landscapes. From Mexican Regional to Spanish flamenco, C. Tangana is simultaneously coming home and reaching out to bridge Latin music boundaries. He's building a community of cross-cultural collaboration, rooted in a unifying love of language and tradition, making it clear he's intent on giving everyone a seat at the table.

The entirety of the show, from impromptu harmony to string octet, hums along with a distinctly Spanish cadence, paying homage to the flamenco-infused streets the global superstar came up in. The concert's star-studded cast of Spanish collaborators, including long-time friends (producers Alizzz and Victor Mart√≠nez) and new contributors (rumba legend Kiko Veneno and flamenco-pop icon La H√ļngara), are each spotlighted for their contributions to the record.

All these parts compound in a room full of people with a shared desire to connect and create juntos, manifesting an authentic joy we've seen again and again at the real Tiny Desk. And at the helm is C. Tangana, humming a melody and bringing the room to life: hands, harmonies, heartbeats, perfectly in sync.

SET LIST
C. Tangana and Antonio Carmona, "Me Maten"
C. Tangana and Kiko Veneno, "Los Tontos"
C. Tangana, "Demasiadas Mujeres"
C. Tangana, La H√ļngara and Ni√Īo De Elche, "T√ļ Me Dejaste De Querer"

MUSICIANS
C. Tangana: vocals
Alizzz: vocoder, keys
Victor Mart√≠nez : guitar, percussion
Antonio Carmona: vocals, percussion
Kiko Veneno: vocals, guitar
La Hungara: vocals
Ni√Īo De Elche: vocals, guitar
Juan Carmona: guitar
Huberto Morales: percussion
Lucia Fernada Carmona: vocals
Pilar Cerezo: vocals
Marina Carmona: vocals
√Āfrica Heredia: vocals
Mar√≠a Rubio: vocals
Mariola Orellana: vocals
Patri Alfaro: vocals
Mari Estrada: vocals

STRING OCTET
Pablo Quintanilla
Paula Sanz
Franciso Palaz√≥n
Marina Arrufat
Paloma Cueto-Felgueroso
Adri√°n V√°zquez
Irma Bau
Daniel Acebes

CREDITS

Audio: Jorge Rodriguez, Sergio Jim√©nez, Pablo Kohler, Harto Rodriguez, El Madrile√Īo, Alex Cappa
Director of Photography: Nauzet Gaspar

toda la polemica con relacion a la comunidad LGTB ha sido mucho mas grande de lo que cualquiera pudo imaginarse.. sin embargo, como les menciono en el video, de todo se aprende y se sale siendo mejor.

para quienes est√©n interesados en acceder a los documentos completos, lo pueden hacer en este link.

snippet.title: El Secreto de la Sincronizaci√≥n | Veritasium en espa√Īol
snippet.description:
¬ŅC√≥mo surge el orden espont√°neamente del caos?
ūüēį SUSCR√ćBETE para ver todos nuestros videos:
http://bit.ly/Suscribirse_Veritasium_ES
 
Un enorme agradecimiento al profesor Steven Strogatz: este video no habr√≠a sido posible sin √©l. Gran parte del gui√≥n se ha inspirado en su maravilloso libro Sync y en su charla TED de 2004. Es un gigante en este campo, y ha escrito literalmente el libro sobre el caos, la complejidad y la sincronizaci√≥n. Es dif√≠cil encontrar un art√≠culo en este campo en el que Steven (o uno de sus estudiantes) no haya contribuido. Su podcast "The Joy of X" es maravilloso - por favor, esc√ļchalo y suscr√≠bete dondequiera que consigas tus podcasts: https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

El incre√≠ble interactivo de Luci√©rnagas de Nicky Case - https://ncase.me/fireflies

El gran modelo interactivo de Kuramoto - https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle/

Referencias: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Sync‚Äč

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000‚Äč

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Goldsztein‚Äč

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Broughton‚Äč

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Bennett2002‚Äč

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002‚Äč

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975‚Äč

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth‚Äč

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005‚Äč

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007‚Äč

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Cardiac‚Äč

Un enorme agradecimiento al profesor Steven Strogatz: este video no habr√≠a sido posible sin √©l. Gran parte del gui√≥n se ha inspirado en su maravilloso libro Sync y en su charla TED de 2004. Es un gigante en este campo, y ha escrito literalmente el libro sobre el caos, la complejidad y la sincronizaci√≥n. Es dif√≠cil encontrar un art√≠culo en este campo en el que Steven (o uno de sus estudiantes) no haya contribuido. Su podcast "The Joy of X" es maravilloso - por favor, esc√ļchalo y suscr√≠bete dondequiera que consigas tus podcasts: https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚ÄĒ https://ve42.co/Sync‚Äč

Letra
"Ella"

Ella tiene algo que me atrae,

To lo que tengo yo me lo he ganao
Mientras tu tiras yo cuento mi money

5 en un Mercedes, de color blanco nieve
Quisiste igualarlo y no puedes
No te da para alquileres, ye ye

F*llando en la sala y en la cocina

Pidiendo cambio pa las propinas
To lo que toco lo pego

 "To Begin Again"
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and Zayn Malik
 
When the world was ending
I‚Äôd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places we‚Äôd never been
When the world was ending
We‚Äôd hold on to the past
Because it‚Äôs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened
 
And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again
 
When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that we‚Äôd play
So far from comprehending
They‚Äôd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened
 
And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again
 
And cry because I‚Äôm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on
 
It‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get another day
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again
To begin to live and love and breathe again

en.title: Cape Horn, the most dangerous sea passage on Earth
en.description:
Cape Horn is in the extreme south of America. It is estimated that there were about 800 shipwrecks there and that 10,000 people lost their lives while trying to unite the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

In this video we propose to discover why it is a unique place. We will also know some surprising peculiarities of the indigenous people who inhabited the area.

Thanks @Sir Chandler for participating! We invite you to know his channel.

snippet.title: MARINA - Purge The Poison (Official Video)
snippet.description:
"ANCIENT DREAMS IN A MODERN LAND". AVAILABLE JUNE 11TH.
PRE-ORDER/ PRE-SAVE: https://marina.lnk.to/ADIAMLID

"PURGE THE POISON" Available Now. https://marina.lnk.to/PurgeThePoisonID

Text 323.433.6663 to join the sisterhood. https://www.allmyfriendsarewitches.com/

Directed by: Weird Life Films @weirdlifefilms
Concept by: MARINA & Weird Life Films
Executive Producers: Laura Gordon, Ryan Ohm, & Jackson James
Video Commissioner: Trevor Joseph Newton
Produced by: Erin Boyle & Anthony Pedone

Gaffer: Paul Deorio

https://marina.lnk.to/applemusic‚Äč
https://soundcloud.com/marinadiamandis

#MARINA #PurgeThePoison #OfficialMusicVideo #AncientDreamsInAModernLand

LYRICS
All my friends are witches
And we live in Hollywood
Mystical bitches
Making our own sisterhood
Whilst society is falling
We are quietly reforming
Protecting the planet
Healing our own damage

Quarantined, all alone
Mother nature on the phone
What have you been doing?
Don‚Äôt forget, I am your home
Virus come, fires burn
Until human beings learn
From every disaster
You are not my master

Need to purge the poison
Show us our humanity
All the bad and good
Racism and misogyny
Nothing‚Äôs hidden anymore
Capitalism made us poor
God forgive America
For every single war

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

2007, when size zero was the rage
Britney shaved her head and all we did was call her crazed
Harvey Weinstein‚Äôs gone to jail, #metoo helped us to unveil
Truth and all its glory
The ending of a story

It‚Äôs a New World Order
Everything just falls away
Our life as we knew it
Now belongs to yesterday
Inside all the love and the hate
We can all regenerate
Stop how we been living
Every single day

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

I just want a world where I can see the feminine
We only make up one quarter of the government
Like an angel gone to hell
Cast the moon under our spell
Owning our power
Taking back what‚Äôs ours

Earth is like a white rose
Quiet cloud of petals cold
A place so corrupt where Angel‚Äôs flesh and blood is sold
The feminine is born as new
Studded with a diamond dew
Saw the dawn was coming
Everybody knew

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

snippet.title: El funeral del pr√≠ncipe Felipe y el lugar d√≥nde permanecer√°n sus restos mortales | ¬°HOLA! TV
snippet.description:
Windsor se prepara para el funeral del duque de Edimburgo el pr√≥ximo 17 de abril en la capilla de San Jorge a la que asistir√°n solo 30 personas. No ser√° un funeral de estado, una petici√≥n hecha por el mismo duque pero la ceremonia s√≠ ser√° retransmitida por la televisi√≥n. La casa real intenta evitar aglomeraciones de gente por la pandemia y se ha pedido a los ciudadanos que no se congreguen en las residencias reales, sin embargo, la gente no ha podido resistirse a dejar flores y notas de condolencias para familia. Los restos mortales del duque ser√°n trasladados a una b√≥veda donde se conservar√°n hasta que fallezca su esposa la reina Isabel II y luego ser enterrados juntos a la capilla conmemorativa del rey Jorge VI.

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite
